name: Sourdough Blueberry Muffin
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first five ingredients in a mixing bowl.
2. Dissolve baking soda and salt in water and add to the mixing bowl along with egg and sourdough starter.
3. Mix just until all ingredients are blended, using your hands rather than a mixer.
4. Add blueberries and mix gently so as not to break the skin on the berries.
5. Spoon batter into a greased muffin tin, filling cups about half full.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
